title: Wu Audit Entry
description: Append-only audit log entry for agent dispatches, stored in .wu/audit.jsonl

agent.description: Alias of the agent that performed the work

phase.description: Phase during which the agent was dispatched

target.description: What was being analyzed, built, or verified

duration_ms.description: Wall-clock duration of the agent run in milliseconds

status.description: Outcome status of the agent dispatch

tokens_in.description: Input tokens consumed by the agent

tokens_out.description: Output tokens produced by the agent

result_hash.description: SHA-256 hex digest of the agent result payload for integrity verification

dispatch_id.description: UUID correlating audit entries from a single CLI invocation

dispatch_mode.description: Which dispatch adapter mode was used
